languages.text: "Что-что? Он хранит залежи ксенотехнологий в своем брюхе?"
"What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"
languages.original_text: "Что-что? Он хранит залежи ксенотехнологий в своем брюхе?"

traits.locale_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"
"What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"
"What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

languages.text: «¿Cómo dice? ¿Que esconde artefactos de xenotecnología en su panza?».
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo dice? ¿Que esconde artefactos de xenotecnología en su panza?».

languages.text: “什么？他在自己肚子里私藏了异形科技？”
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: “什么？他在自己肚子里私藏了异形科技？”

languages.text: « Comment ? Il cache de la xénotech dans son ventre ? »
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: « Comment ? Il cache de la xénotech dans son ventre ? »

languages.text: "Şimdi ne oldu? Göbeğinde zeno teknolojisi rezervi mi saklıyor?"
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi ne oldu? Göbeğinde zeno teknolojisi rezervi mi saklıyor?"

languages.text: 「今度は何だ？ 彼は腹の中に異星技術の備蓄を隠し持っているというのか？」
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: 「今度は何だ？ 彼は腹の中に異星技術の備蓄を隠し持っているというのか？」

languages.text: "Was jetzt? Er hat in seinem Bauch Xenotech-Reserven?"
languages.original_text: "What now? He's harbouring xenotech reserves in his belly?"

traits.locale_text: "Was jetzt? Er hat in seinem Bauch Xenotech-Reserven?"
